Education

Technology × Design × Entrepreneurship

A project-centric curriculum to develop both the power to make and the power to start — moving fluidly across the three areas over five years.

Curriculum

Five years, in flow

  1. Year 1

    Foundations

    Cross foundations of programming, design, English and liberal arts.

  2. Year 2

    Skills

    Build implementation skills in software, hardware, and design.

  3. Year 3

    Projects

    Team-based, iterative project learning from prototype to validation.

  4. Year 4

    Practice

    Industry / community projects, long internships, study abroad.

  5. Year 5

    Launch

    Capstone work or venture launch — ship your five years to the world.

Approach

How we learn

Project-based

Real problems and themes, addressed in teams through cycles of hypothesis and validation.

Connected to community

Kamiyama's people, industries, and nature become the textbook beyond the classroom.

Faculty across worlds

Researchers, founders, designers and engineers from the field teach side by side.

Living together

Residential life is part of the learning — collaboration and dialogue, every day.

Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology

Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology

An unofficial introduction to Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology, a private KOSEN located in Kamiyama, Tokushima, Japan.
